checks.name: full_python_suite
checks.limitations: Aggregate coverage does not prove high-authority paths are adequately covered.

checks.name: ruff
checks.limitations: Configured Ruff rules cover blocking correctness, not a complete security analysis.

checks.name: mypy_contract
checks.command: .venv/bin/mypy algo_cli/main.py algo_cli/tool_runtime.py algo_cli/tools.py algo_cli/harness.py algo_cli/agent_pipeline.py algo_cli/execution_guardrails.py algo_cli/private_event_store.py algo_cli/perf_telemetry.py algo_cli/skills.py algo_cli/evals/competitive_harness_rating.py --ignore-missing-imports --no-strict-optional --follow-imports=skip --show-error-codes --cache-dir /tmp/algo-cli-mypy-cache
checks.evidence: Success: no issues found in 10 source files
checks.limitations: This is the existing scoped contract, not strict whole-repository typing.

checks.name: public_source_scan
checks.limitations: Pattern scans cannot prove absence of every private datum.

checks.name: reachable_history_scan
checks.evidence: Public-history content and metadata scan passed

checks.name: python_dependency_audit
checks.limitations: The advisory database and currently installed environment are time-dependent.

checks.name: rust_indexer
checks.limitations: No behavior or security assertions exist.

checks.name: go_gateway
checks.limitations: No behavior or security assertions exist.

checks.name: website
checks.command: npm test; npm run lint; npm audit
checks.evidence: 4 rendered-route tests passed; lint passed; zero known vulnerabilities
checks.limitations: Build emitted a vinext route-classification warning and a Node module.register deprecation warning.

checks.name: package_build
checks.evidence: wheel and sdist built; metadata checks passed
checks.limitations: Artifacts are unsigned Python distributions and are not a release authorization.

checks.name: wheel_smoke_reused_dist
checks.evidence: Expected one wheel but found current v0.18.0 and stale v0.15.1 wheels
checks.limitations: CI normally starts from a clean checkout, but the local release check is not deterministic in a reused directory.

checks.name: wheel_smoke_clean_dist_uv_python
checks.evidence: uv-managed Python 3.10 venv ensurepip failed before wheel installation
checks.limitations: This failure depends on the local Python distribution.

checks.name: wheel_smoke_clean_dist_homebrew_python
checks.evidence: Installed wheel, version/help/module/doctor/corpus checks passed under Python 3.14.6
checks.limitations: A networked install resolved current dependency versions and does not cover every supported Python/OS cell.

checks.name: wheel_smoke_hardened_reused_dist_uv_python
checks.evidence: Selected the source-version v0.18.0 wheel despite stale v0.15.1 artifacts, recovered from ensurepip failure with an isolated uv-seeded venv, and passed all installed checks under Python 3.10.20
checks.limitations: Network dependency resolution remains time-dependent and cross-platform cells remain CI evidence.

checks.name: published_benchmark_snapshot
checks.command: sha256 benchmark summary and warmup receipt
checks.limitations: This is a frozen pre-hardening snapshot, not evidence for the hardened runtime.

baseline_conclusion: The v0.18.0 unit, quality, source, dependency, website, and package baselines are generally green. The release smoke's stale-artifact and uv-Python failures were reproduced, fixed, and verified. Rust and Go helpers still have no behavioral tests and remain an open hardening requirement.
